title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Honeywell India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Honeywell India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
